creator: freebsd@linepoint.com
text:
Update port from 0.0.7 to 0.0.8

Fix: Patch:

-= start

PORTNAME=      libvanessa_logger
-PORTVERSION=   0.0.7
+PORTVERSION=   0.0.8
 CATEGORIES=    devel
 MASTER_SITES=  http://www.vergenet.net/linux/vanessa/download/%SUBDIR%/
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    vanessa_logger/${PORTVERSION}


-= end--Z2rrmRRtLhQI59Jkhwm9maibfPwrf4rpQzq6IIzOPN8Xh6hE
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/devel/libvanessa_logger.0.0.7/Makefile /usr/ports/devel/libvanessa_logger/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/devel/libvanessa_logger.0.0.7/Makefile   2009-08-02 15:33:27.000000000 -0400
+++ /usr/ports/devel/libvanessa_logger/Makefile 2010-02-24 15:35:37.000000000 -0500
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
